ttps.technique: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Web Session Cookie
ttps.evidence_snippet: Used stolen cookie to authenticate to cloud services (T1550.004)
SSH to other compute instances (T1021.004, T1021.007, T1078.002, T1078.004)
SSH to other compute instances (T1021.004, T1021.007, T1078.002, T1078.004)
Hands-on-keyboard host reconnaissance activities (T1010, T1518, T1082, T1083, T1124)
Enumeration of AWS resources, configuration, etc. (T1580, T1526, T1619)

ttps.technique: Supply Chain Compromise: Compromise Software Dependencies and Development Tools
ttps.evidence_snippet: Uploaded malicious version of JavaScript files on target S3 (T1195.001 / 1565.001)
Execution of payloads on EKS pods (T1105, T1543.005)

summary: Google Cloud Threat Horizons Report H2 2025 analyzes evolving cloud threats: foundational hygiene gaps (47.1% weak/absent credentials, 29.4% misconfigs in H1 2025), backup targeting by ransomware (UNC2165/RANSOMHUB, UNC4393/BASTA, UNC2465/DARKSID/LOCKBIT), UNC4899 (North Korean, TraderTraitor) social engineering via Telegram/LinkedIn leading to Docker container execution (GLASSCANNON/PLOTTWIST/MAZEWIRE), MFA bypass via stolen cookies, gcloud/AWS CLI access, crypto theft (millions USD stolen Q3 2024-Q1 2025). Decoy PDF files (.desktop droppers) hosted on Google Drive/SharePoint/Dropbox/GitHub deceive users while background malware executes. Chrome Extension supply chain risks via OAuth phishing; mitigations include Verified CRX Upload. Recommends Cloud Isolated Recovery Environment (CIRE) with immutable vaults, IAM least privilege, leaked credential monitoring, VPC Service Controls.

timeline.event: UNC4899 (North Korean, TraderTraitor) active since at least 2020 targeting cryptocurrency/blockchain
timeline.evidence_snippet: UNC4899 active since at least 2020, primarily targeting cryptocurrency and blockchain industries

timeline.event: Mandiant responds to UNC4899 incidents at two organizations (Google Cloud and AWS environments)
timeline.evidence_snippet: Between Q3 2024 and Q1 2025, Mandiant responded to two UNC4899 incidents

timeline.event: Google Cloud CVR discovers critical Rsync vulnerabilities (RCE risk), coordinated disclosure Q1 2025
timeline.evidence_snippet: Google Cloud CVR proactively discovered critical Rsync vulnerabilities in Q4 2024

timeline.event: UNC4899 cryptocurrency thefts executed (millions USD stolen); Mandiant incident responses complete
timeline.evidence_snippet: Between Q3 2024 and Q1 2025, Mandiant responded to two incidents attributed to UNC4899

timeline.event: Verified CRX Upload feature launched for Chrome Web Store (May 2025)
timeline.evidence_snippet: Launched in May 2025, developers can opt-in to Verified CRX Upload

timeline.event: Initial access vectors: 47.1% weak/absent credentials, 29.4% misconfigs, 11.8% API/UI compromise
timeline.evidence_snippet: During the first half of 2025, weak or absent credentials were the predominant threat, accounting for 47.1% of incidents
